mapper.sql: id, warehouse_id, lock_key, owner_type, owner_id, status, expire_at, created_at, updated_at

select from wcs_resource_lock WITH (NOLOCK)
select from wcs_resource_lock
order by id desc

choose.when: select from wcs_resource_lock WITH (NOLOCK) where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and id = #{id}
choose.otherwise: select from wcs_resource_lock where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and id = #{id}

choose.when: select from wcs_resource_lock WITH (NOLOCK) where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and lock_key = #{lockKey}
choose.otherwise: select from wcs_resource_lock where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and lock_key = #{lockKey}

mapper.update:
update wcs_resource_lock
owner_type = #{ownerType}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, status = #{status}, expire_at = #{expireAt},
updated_at = GETDATE() updated_at = now()
where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and lock_key = #{lockKey} and (status != 'HELD' or expire_at is null or expire_at <= #{now})
